title: ASR Outdoor 2 Person Reflective Emergency Shelter Lightweight Waterproof Tent
description:
Have you ever been caught outside in an unexpected storm, only to realize you don’t have any protection from the elements? You can avoid this unfortunate situation with the ASR Outdoor Emergency Shelter! Our emergency tent is constructed of high-quality reflective material that helps conserve body heat. It is tear and puncture-resistant and will provide shelter and protection for up to two adults in an emergency. This emergency shelter is both lightweight and portable, making it a great addition to any bug-out bag or emergency prep kit. It measures 8 feet by 8 feet once unfolded and folds down to just 9 inches by 6 inches so it can easily be stored in a backpack, bag, or vehicle trunk

ASR Outdoor 2 Person Reflective Emergency Shelter Lightweight Waterproof Tent

Have you ever been caught outside in an unexpected storm, only to realize you don’t have any protection from the elements? You can avoid this unfortunate situation with the ASR Outdoor Emergency Shelter!

Key Features

  • TWO PERSON EMERGENCY SHELTER – The ASR Outdoor survival tent emergency shelter will accommodate up to two adults, providing protection from the elements in less than ideal weather conditions.
  • REFLECTIVE MATERIAL – Our outdoor shelter tent is constructed of high-quality reflective material that will help conserve body heat. The emergency tent is flexible, waterproof and windproof so you can count on it to provide shelter in an outdoor emergency or natural disaster situation.
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE – This shelter is designed to be both lightweight and portable, making it a great addition to any bug out bag or emergency prep kit. It is is tear and puncture-resistant and measures 8’ x 8’ once unfolded. It folds down to just 9” x 6” so it can easily be stored in a backpack, bag, vehicle trunk or boat.
  • EASY TO USE – The waterproof shelter comes with a 20’ long nylon rope so you can unfold it and create your shelter. Simply unfold the tent, tie the shelter with the rope through both ends to trees or posts and you’ll have a tent in no time.
  • MULTI-PURPOSE SHELTER – Although the ASR Outdoor shelter tent was designed for emergencies, it’s also a great lightweight and portable option for camping and hiking. Since it’s so small, it won’t’ add a bunch of weight or bulk to your backpack or camping gear.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROEMTSLV1
  • UPC: 810058485663
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: M

Our emergency tent is constructed of high-quality reflective material that helps conserve body heat. It is tear and puncture-resistant and will provide shelter and protection for up to two adults in an emergency.

This emergency shelter is both lightweight and portable, making it a great addition to any bug-out bag or emergency prep kit. It measures 8 feet by 8 feet once unfolded and folds down to just 9 inches by 6 inches so it can easily be stored in a backpack, bag, or vehicle trunk.

The ASR Outdoor waterproof shelter is also super easy to use - simply unfold the tent, tie the shelter with the included nylon rope through both ends to trees or posts and you’ll have a tent in no time. It’s flexible and windproof so you can count on it to provide shelter in an outdoor emergency or natural disaster situation. Don’t get caught in a storm without one of these emergency shelters!
